name: rinawarp-terminal-pro
description: RinaWarp agent-first desktop app for build, test, deploy, and system workflows
author: RinaWarp Team <team@rinawarptech.com>

scripts.build:electron: npm run check:ipc && npm run build:preload && tsc -b tsconfig.json && node scripts/copy-static.mjs
scripts.build:packaged-linux: npm run build:electron && electron-builder --linux dir --publish never
scripts.test:ipc: npm run build:electron && bash scripts/run-electron-playwright.sh tests/e2e/rina-ipc-full-smoke.test.ts
scripts.test:playwright:ci: CI=1 npm run build:electron && bash scripts/run-electron-playwright.sh
scripts.test:playwright:smoke: npm run build:electron && bash scripts/run-electron-playwright.sh rina-tools.smoke.spec.ts smoke.electron.spec.ts --workers=4
scripts.test:playwright:ipc: npm run build:electron && bash scripts/run-electron-playwright.sh rina-ipc --workers=4
scripts.test:playwright:tools: npm run build:electron && bash scripts/run-electron-playwright.sh rina-tools --workers=4
scripts.test:e2e:packaged-first-run: npm run build:packaged-linux && bash scripts/run-electron-playwright.sh tests/e2e/packaged-first-run.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:core: npm run test:e2e:first-run && npm run test:e2e:proof && npm run test:e2e:conversation && npm run test:trust-smoke
scripts.qa:receipt-recovery: npm run test:unit -- run-intelligence.test.ts && npm run test:e2e:core
scripts.qa:first-run: npm run build:electron && npm run test:unit -- first-run-status.test.ts && npm run test:e2e:first-run && npm run test:e2e:packaged-first-run
scripts.qa:stabilization-core: npm run test:unit -- first-run-status.test.ts && npm run test:e2e:packaged-first-run
scripts.qa:wiring: npm run check:ipc:contracts && npm run test:unit -- state-invariants.test.ts
scripts.qa:ownership: vitest run tests/unit/event-ownership.test.ts tests/unit/view-state-ownership.test.ts tests/unit/state-invariants.test.ts tests/unit/navigation-ownership.test.ts tests/unit/runtime-ownership.test.ts tests/unit/workspace-ownership.test.ts tests/unit/utility-ownership.test.ts
scripts.qa:intents: npm run test:unit -- intent-contracts.test.ts && node --test --test-reporter=spec tests/agent.test.mjs
scripts.qa:release-candidate: npm run test:unit -- first-run-status.test.ts && npm run test:agent && npm run test:e2e:first-run && npm run test:e2e:packaged-first-run
scripts.test:all: npm run test:unit && npm run test:playwright
scripts.release:readiness: npm run build:electron && npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e:core && npm run test:e2e:packaged-first-run && bash scripts/run-electron-playwright.sh tests/e2e/smoke.electron.spec.ts tests/e2e/settings.spec.ts tests/e2e/marketplace.spec.ts tests/e2e/visual-qa.spec.ts tests/e2e/updates.spec.ts tests/e2e/release-golden-journeys.spec.ts
scripts.dev:terminal: cross-env RINAWARP_DEV=1 npm run continuous-smoke && npm run dev
scripts.e2e:smoke: unset FORCE_COLOR && unset NO_COLOR && unset ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE && npm run build:electron && bash scripts/run-electron-playwright.sh
scripts.e2e:smoke:headed: unset FORCE_COLOR && unset NO_COLOR && unset ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE && npm run build:electron && bash scripts/run-electron-playwright.sh --headed
scripts.dev: unset ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE && npm run build:electron && npx electron .
scripts.build:all: npm run build:electron && npm run package:linux && npm run package:win
